case_title: EGH LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ELIZABETH BYES

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, ELIZABETH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EGH LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYES, ELIZABETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 10/15/08, $2,155.00 RENT, $370.00 COSTS, $892.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES,, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,417.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EGH LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, ELIZABETH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
